title: CarianStyle
description: An enchantment type mod based on the Elden Ring game
body:
# Description:

This mod is an enchantment type mod based on the game content of the Elden Ring.

You can get these enchantments in the usual way, there are also some very rare reminiscence enchantments.

Certain enchantments combine to be very powerful, but they always have their own drawbacks.

For example, the fire enchantment must be on fire, and the moon enchantment must be effective at night.

With more than 100 different spells, and new enchantments will be added in subsequent updates, use them to defeat your enemies!

In it, you can still experience the customs and customs of Elden Ring, even if you haven't played this game!

## How to know what an enchantment does:

You can use Enchantment Descriptions to see what each enchant does

## Can remove unwanted enchantments:

Fill in the id of the enchantment in the uninstall place in the config/carianstyle.cfg file. The specific id can be viewed by opening the language file. The one before = is the corresponding id.

![effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4edad5c377ddd57fc68f387fae25d7f044916550.png)
